title: crepidium obovatum
intro: Crepidium obovatum, also known as the terrestrial orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Crepidium obovatum include the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or ointment for wound healing.
